parameters.name: xgrp
parameters.label: X-Section Group
parameters.description: You can use only a subset of primitives from the Cross-section inputs by specifying a group here.

parameters.name: pathgrp
parameters.label: Path Group
parameters.description: You can use only a subset of primitives from the Backbone inputs by specifying a group here.

parameters.name: refgrp
parameters.label: Reference Group
parameters.description: You can use only a subset of primitives from the inputs by specifying a group here.

parameters.name: cycle
parameters.label: Cycle Type
parameters.description: Determines the Cycle Type based on these menu options.

parameters.name: angle
parameters.label: Angle Fix
parameters.description: Attempts to fix buckling twists that may occur when sweeping.

parameters.name: noflip
parameters.label: Fix Flipping
parameters.description: Attempts to fix buckling twists that may occur when sweeping by fixing flipped normals.

parameters.name: skipcoin
parameters.label: Remove Coincident Points on Path
parameters.description: When selected, any points right on top of one another will be ignored.

parameters.name: aimatref
parameters.label: Aim at Reference Points
parameters.description: Points are used in conjunction with the backbone to control the orientation of the elements along the sweep. This is done by drawing a line between the reference point and corresponding backbone point

parameters.name: usevtx
parameters.label: Use Vertex
parameters.description: Use vertex number of the incoming cross-section to place the cross-section on the backbone.

parameters.name: vertex
parameters.label: Connection Vertex
parameters.description: Specify a specific vertex to connect to the backbone.

parameters.name: twist
parameters.label: Twist
parameters.description: Cumulative rotation of the cross sections around the backbone. If a value of five is specified, the cross section at the first point of the backbone is rotated five degrees, the next ten degrees, the

parameters.name: roll
parameters.label: Roll
parameters.description: Non-cumulative rotation of the cross sections around the backbone. All cross sections get the same rotation.

parameters.name: newg
parameters.label: Create Groups
parameters.description: Selecting this option enables the creation of groups. A group is created for each backbone that is incoming. This allows for easy skinning in the .

parameters.name: sweepgrp
parameters.label: Sweep Groups
parameters.description: Specify the name of your output groups in this field.

parameters.name: skin
parameters.label: Skin Output
parameters.description: Determines the output based on these menu options.

parameters.name: fast
parameters.label: Fast Sweep
parameters.description: Enables an optimized skinning technique which speeds up output from 2 - 4 times in many cases at the expense of accuracy. In order for it to work correctly, the input topologies must remain consistent
